programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the vast outdoors with daylight fading fast.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Joni Table Talk
programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.sub-title: Puffy in the Sky With Diamonds
programme.desc: In Irving, Texas, one of the buyers stands to uncover a diamond in the rough.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars Texas
programme.desc: Jenny uses her feminine wiles to get an edge up on her mostly male competitors; Ricky and Bubba set a record; Mary has second thoughts on a locker find that Moe feels is worthless.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers hope for better outcomes when they return to Long Beach, Calif.; a heavy hitter brings $50,000 in locker funds; Barry acts on a tip.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Brandi rescues a loose pooch from oncoming traffic in Riverside, Calif.; Darrell's unit confirms his Magic Bullet Theory; Kenny's locker contains a shiny score.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The women outnumber the men in Rosamond, as Dusty and his girlfriend discover a stockpile of vintage TV memorabilia; Brandi enlists the help of both Danielle and Lisa to dig for gold.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers battle in Costa Mesa, Calif.; a unit is filled with rock memorabilia; Darrell and Jarrod vie for an antique slide projector.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emily receives a newlywed-themed surprise from the girls; Rene reels in a big locker; Darrell tests his bicycle knowledge, and wins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene and Casey display their confidence by arriving with a caravan of trucks; Darrell hopes to distract his competitors with doughnuts; Jarrod and Brandi plan an anniversary party for their store.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: A beloved mother is found stabbed to death in a vacant lot and, when New Orleans detectives investigate the case, their only suspect seems an unlikely killer; with the help of the victim's daughter, prosecutors fight to restore her dignity.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: After a beloved teacher is gunned down in broad daylight, Gwinnett detectives must track down the suspects, with only their getaway car's description; in the pursuit of justice, the prosecution must overcome the threat of a mistrial.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: After the First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, two men are murdered in a parking lot, but a gun from another shooting incident leads detectives to their suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The First 48
programme.sub-title: Room for the Night; Down and Out
programme.desc: Police investigate the killing of a man in a New Orleans motel room; a night of drinking in Tulsa, Okla., sparks a murderous rage, resulting in a man being stabbed 21 times.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In New Orleans, detectives make a gruesome discovery inside a car that was set on fire; Det. Ryan Vaught hopes the last person who spoke to the victim can lead him to the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, Okla., detectives investigate the murder of a man with a troubled past, and they uncover a sinister plot.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: When an attempted robbery ends in the murder of a retired sheriff's deputy, Gwinnett County detectives believe the suspects will strike again and race to track them down before more blood is shed.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Gwinnett County, a 20-year-old woman is found in her apartment a day after being brutally stabbed over 40 times. In Mobile, dozens of bullets are fired at a busy intersection leaving two men dead in a crashed car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Tulsa, when a deadly ambush leaves two teens dead and two others critically injured, Det. Jason White follows leads from Tulsa to Mexico in his pursuit for justice.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: Tulsa Detective Vernon McNeal confronts a group of childhood friends to find a killer who blindly shot into a bedroom window.

programme.title: Predator Hunters
programme.desc: When a predator plans to meet a 13-year-old at the mall, Detective Tony Godwin races to pull off his fastest ever takedown. Then, an FBI lead points to one home and two suspects. A predator's deviant secret is discovered in a church dumpster.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: After a 69-year-old woman is found dead in her bathtub, a suspect leads detectives from Tulsa, Okla., on a high-speed chase that ends tragically.

programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.desc: Joni and guests tackle a wide range of relevant issues, controversial subjects and hard-hitting news topics with candor and wit.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A daughter testifies against her father, who is accused of murdering her mother; the mystery of a suburban hate crime caught on camera plays out in court; a defendant attempts to get a judge's attention through any means necessary and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A mother asks the judge to sterilize her murderous daughter; a French tourist is in trouble for writing bad checks; a grandma forgives her grandson's killer and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A teenage defendant faces the wrath of a furious judge; a notorious killer breaks down in court; a defiant judge refuses to let COVID-19 disrupt business as usual.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A stalker tries to take his own life in the courtroom; the family of a murder victim attempts to get revenge by any means necessary; a judge throws the book at teen murder suspects who show no remorse.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A desperate defendant makes an impossible courthouse escape; a young man squares off in court--against his own parents; a heartbreaking victim impact statement from a devastated father; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The shocking testimony of a man accused of murdering his wife; a defense attorney receives the worst birthday present of his life in court; a defendant attempts a daring courthouse escape.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A convicted killer sends a vile message after learning her sentence; a court appearance by the Miami "Joker" is no laughing matter; a father's rage takes over when he confronts his daughter's killer.

programme.desc: A murderer and a judge square off; a distraught defendant who can't face his sentence does the unthinkable; a bailiff gets caught trying to go above the law.

programme.desc: A widow apologizes to the man who killed her late husband; a courthouse break-in leads to a manhunt; a restaurant owner pays a stiff price for defying COVID-19 restrictions.

programme.desc: The mother of a murder victim comes face to face with the killer: her own grandson; a widow seeks her own form of justice; courthouse nuptials take a shocking turn.

programme.desc: A spit guard and shackles can't contain the rage of a convicted felon told he's going to jail for life; devastated family members seek justice in court-by any means necessary.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A cold case is officially closed when a killer makes a shocking courtroom confession for a 50-year-old crime; an angry defendant takes on the judge, prosecutor and everyone else in his path; a widow seeks her own brand of courtroom justice.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A woman accused of driving with a suspended license is held in contempt after cursing at the judge during a virtual hearing; the judge calls out a defendant when it's discovered that he's entered a derogatory name for his probation office.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.sub-title: Top Five: Caught In The Crossfire
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments featuring attorneys who end up in physical confrontations: a lawyer gets knocked out when blindsided by a punch; a defendant attacks his own public defender; a prosecutor gets spit on; and more.

programme.desc: A murder trial descends into chaos and confusion; an aspiring country singer gets stage fright in bond court; a career criminal attempts to teach a fellow defendant a life lesson.

programme.desc: A customer attacks fast food workers over her slushy order; a judge has no mercy for a corrupt sheriff; a suspended driver shows up for virtual court in the driver's seat of his car; and more.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the vast outdoors with daylight fading fast.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When officers issue that final K-9 warning, it's the last chance to back down - surrender or face the dog. K-9 Scout collides head-on with an armed suspect who refuses to back down and K-9 Vlad, "The Impaler," squares up with a defiant driver who won't follow commands. In the dead of night, K-9 Edge tracks down and takes down two fleeing suspected thieves and K-9 ZAM methodically tears through a vehicle search, uncovering a laundry list of charges.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When fleeing suspects put the public at risk, K9 teams race the clock to shut it down; K9 Haywire rolls in with SWAT, in search of a hit-and-run suspect who vanishes into a residential area; in a tense nighttime manhunt, K9s Ax and Endo step into the line of fire to shield their handlers; K9 Rico pulls double duty when a routine traffic stop erupts into chaos; under a blazing sun, K9 King battles the heat to stay on scent and close the gap.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When a suspect panics and runs, the dog smells it instantly; one bad decision leads to a very fast ending. K-9 Jax chases after a suspect accused of stealing a car; K-9 Bane helps bring a multi-state manhunt for one of Philadelphia's most wanted to a shocking end; after a funeral procession, K9 Timmy ends a tense standoff and K9 Jedi makes his handler into the happiest cop in the force.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When suspects make a run, K9 teams prove why the nose always knows; rookie K9 Duder gets thrown into the deep end when a high-speed chase explodes into a full-blown foot pursuit; after breaking into a store, a desperate suspect plays a dangerous game of hide-and-seek with K9 Ice; K9 Chico kicks into turbo mode, tracking down a fleeing suspect with a backpack stuffed with drugs; K9 Dobby sniffs out a woman accused of double murder.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: After crashing and ditching a limo, a suspect bolts into a dense, unforgiving stretch of woods and refuses to surrender. Can K9 Chase bring the standoff to an end? When a man threatens to harm himself, officers turn to a less-lethal option, K9 Milo, to safely bring the volatile situation under control. Meanwhile, K9 Nicky faces a race against time. A missing toddler has vanished somewhere in the vast outdoors with daylight fading fast.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: When high-speed chases end in foot pursuits, the K9 takes over where engines can't; on Valentine's Day, K9 Igo shuts down a tense standoff before it explodes; K9 Duder teams up with a fellow K9 unit in a takedown that leaves a suspect nowhere to run; K9 Chase proves his name isn't just for show; and K9 Apollo sniffs out someone buried deep in thick brush within seconds.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: Fresh out of the academy, rookie K9 Carrier gets the call, but can he score his first apprehension?; in a pounding downpour, K9 Flash stays locked on the scent, tracking a suspect who bolted even after being tasered.
